entries.title: Employees Say Claude Is the AI They Can’t Work Without
entries.summary: Consumers increasingly use different artificial intelligence (AI) tools for different parts of their lives. OpenAI’s ChatGPT remains the platform people choose for personal tasks, while Anthropic’s Claude has emerged as the platform workers are most likely to view as essential to getting their jobs done. The surge of investor enthusiasm surrounding Anthropic’s prospective IPO […] The post Em

entries.title: Sam Altman Aims to Shape AI Collaborations in Washington Meetings
entries.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman met with lawmakers and White House officials Wednesday (June 3), a day after President Donald Trump signed an artificial intelligence-focused executive order, CNBC reported Wednesday. Altman met with administration officials at the White House and with lawmakers of both parties, including House Speaker Mike Johnson and House Minority Leader Hakeem […] The post Sam Altma

entries.title: Meet the Jobs That Didn’t Exist Before AI
entries.summary: Box CEO Aaron Levie told The New York Times that artificial intelligence has created 13 new job categories at the company. He didn’t frame it as a displacement story. Writing on X, Levie said forward deployed engineers are about to become one of the most in-demand jobs in tech. The role belongs to specialists […] The post Meet the Jobs That Didn’t Exist Before AI appeared first on PYMNTS.com

entries.title: Alphabet Increases Record-Breaking Stock Offering to Feed AI Demand
entries.summary: Two days after announcing a plan to raise $80 billion in equity capital to expand its artificial intelligence infrastructure, Alphabet raised it to $84.75 billion. The underwritten public offerings that were previously announced at a total of $30 billion have been upsized to $34.75 billion, the Google parent company said in a press release […] The post Alphabet Increases Record-Breaking Stoc

entries.title: Significant AI investment boosts transaction success for Ecommpay merchants
entries.summary: In a market where a failed transaction is lost revenue and potentially a lost customer, inclusive global payments platform, Ecommpay, is on a mission to push checkout performance to its absolute limit.

entries.summary: Payments Canada announced today the approval of new members including Beem Credit Union, Ebury Partners Canada Limited (“Ebury”), Shaype Canada Financial Limited (“Shaype”), Libro Credit Union and Newton Crypto Ltd.

entries.title: XTransfer and SocGen combine to support international trade flows
entries.summary: XTransfer, the world’s leading B2B cross-border trade payment platform, and Societe Generale, a leading European bank in transaction banking, announced having signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) during Money20/20 Europe 2026 in Amsterdam, to enhance cross-border payment infrastructure and develop integrated financial solutions to support international trade flows.
